pr.title: Record Submission: 1.1091 BPB - Turbo-Muon + EngramLite + ParamBanking + XSA (11L 512d)

output.summary: 11L GPT packs Turbo-Muon optimizer, EngramLite hash embeddings, Parameter Banking, gated skips/ValueEmbedding, SmearGate, XSA, and GPTQ mixed precision.
techniques: Turbo-Muon optimizer with AOL preconditioning and Polar Express coefficients
EngramLite plus Parameter Banking for efficient hashing and batched Newton-Schulz
GPTQ mixed-precision with Hessian-aware bit tuning and late soft-round QAT
